Bank Account Details: Account Holder: FEEL SAFE PRIVATE LIMITED, Account Number: 50200120760164, IFSC: HDFC0000438, Branch: NAJAFGARH, Account Type: Current Account

Product Buy-Back & Refund Policy

At Feel Safe Private Limited, we adhere strictly to the Consumer Protection (Direct Selling) Rules, 2021. Our policy ensures complete transparency for all customers and independent distributors (Sakhis).

1. Mandatory Delivery Unboxing Video (48-Hour Window)
  • Proof Requirement: To claim any refund or replacement for damaged, leaking, wrong, or missing hygiene products, a continuous, unedited Unboxing Video is mandatory.
  • Timeframe: The video and product pictures must be emailed within 48 hours of delivery. No claims for transit damages or shortages will be entertained without an uncut unboxing video.
2. 30-Day Cooling-Off & Buy-Back Policy
  • Eligibility: Sakhis and customers can claim a refund within 30 days from the invoice date for any unused, unopened, and marketable products.
  • No Partial Refunds: Returns apply only to the complete purchase order or full kit/combo. Partial returns of individual items from a set are not accepted.
  • Deductions: The final refund will be processed after deducting TDS (as per Government rules), Sales Incentives/Commissions already distributed on the order, and actual shipping charges.
3. How to Process Your Return
  • Send an email to support@feelsafeco.in with your Order ID, Sakhi ID, Invoice Copy, and the Unboxing Video.
  • After verification and receipt of physical goods at our center, the refund will be credited to the original payment source within standard banking timelines.
📄 View / Download Official PDF Invoice

Note: Please save/print this receipt for future reference. For assistance under the Feel Safe Sakhi Yojana, visit feelsafeco.in or mail us at support@feelsafeco.in.

ticket_raised.subject: Support Ticket Created - Feel Safe Helpdesk
ticket_raised.plainTextMessage: Your support ticket has been logged into our system. Our technical helpdesk team is reviewing the issue and will get back to you shortly.
ticket_raised.htmlContent:
Feel Safe

Ticket Received

Hello, we have successfully generated a customer service ticket for your issue. Our dedicated support engineering staff is looking into your case details.

Expected Response Time: Within 12-24 business hours.

Please refrain from submitting duplicate records to avoid resetting your position in our customer service queue.

ticket_reply.subject: Update: New reply to your Feel Safe support ticket

ticket_reply.htmlContent:
Feel Safe

New Agent Response

An engineering specialist has updated your open customer service file. Please tap below to access our platform portal and safely read the full transmission details.

View Support Thread

If the problem has resolved itself, you may close the communication window at your convenience.
